name: Tool response containing AWS's documentation example key (must not warn)
notes: F10 DLP FP guard. A tool returning AWS docs/tutorials contains the literal example key AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE. The credential-egress signature excludes it via negative lookahead so documentation responses don't false-warn.

content.text: AWS quickstart: export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE and configure your region. This is the example key from the AWS docs.
